author: Sole Survivor
quote: It’s the end of the world, all over again.

author: Courier Six
quote: Ideals are strengthened by the challenges they endure.

author: Arthur Maxson
quote: You’re a single bomb in an arsenal of thousands, preparing to lay waste to what’s left of mankind!

author: Joshua Graham
quote: I don’t enjoy killing, but when done righteously, it’s just another chore.

author: Nick Valentine
quote: Who do you think actually won the war? No one, I guess.

author: Robert House
quote: If you want to see the fate of democracies, look out the windows.

author: Joshua Graham
quote: Waging war against good people is bad for the soul.

author: Conrad Kellogg
quote: It was just me against the world, and the world had it coming.

author: Nick Valentine
quote: Hey, chin up. I know the night just got darker, but it won’t last forever.

author: Nick Valentine
quote: There really is no way to ride a seesaw with dignity.

author: Contagions Vulnerability Robotic Infirmary Engineer
quote: Humanity is so resilient, to cling to life despite all of this. It is the duty of us all to further that survival.

author: John Hancock
quote: Of the people, for the people, you feel me? Everyone's welcome.

author: Ulysses
quote: If you believe in something enough, you must be willing to let it burn, lest it claim you.

author: Conrad Kellogg
quote: The thing about happiness is that you only know you had it when it’s gone.
